title: Comparison of Early Proton Pump Inhibitor Initiation Versus Usual Care on Acute Kidney Injury in Hemorrhagic Shock Patients

skipped_criteria: Hemorrhagic shock criterion requiring (SBP ≤ 90 AND HR ≥ 108) OR (SBP ≤ 70): compound OR logic across two fields cannot be expressed in the schema; only SBP ≤ 90 is encoded as a partial approximation.
Patients known to be actively on renal replacement therapy: no renal replacement therapy field exists in the schema.
Patients deemed to have expected survival of less than 24 hours: no survival prognosis field exists in the schema.
History of PPI sensitivity or allergy: no allergy/medication history field exists in the schema.
Patients already enrolled in other trials that do not allow co-enrollment: no trial enrollment field exists in the schema.
Patients presenting with ongoing GI bleeding requiring higher dose GI prophylaxis: no GI bleeding field exists in the schema.
Prisoners excluded as a vulnerable population: no incarceration status field exists in the schema.
